narrative:
Luis Romo is a defensive midfielder for Mexico, currently holding an overall rating of 7.21/10. This impressive score places him in the top 4% of defensive midfields at this tournament. His rating range, from 6.79–7.64, reflects a consistent performance across his World Cup minutes played.

At this World Cup, Romo has demonstrated a remarkable offensive contribution, scoring 0.336 goals and providing 0.336 assists per 90 minutes. These figures significantly outpace his expected goals of 0.037 and expected assists of 0.076 per 90 minutes. Defensively, he contributes with 2.015 tackles and 1.343 interceptions per 90 minutes.

Romo plays a pivotal role for Mexico, balancing his defensive duties with a potent offensive impact. Scouts should closely watch his ability to maintain such high goal and assist output, especially when compared to his expected metrics. His continued influence in both phases of play will be crucial for Mexico's tournament hopes.
